query:
SELECT
            name as "name!",
            size_bytes as "size_bytes!",
            file_count as "file_count!",
            created_at as "created_at!",
            created_by as "created_by!",
            updated_at,
            updated_by,
            description as "description!",
            last_used_at,
            extra_perms as "extra_perms!"
         FROM (
            SELECT
                COALESCE(v.name, a.path) as name,
                COALESCE(v.size_bytes, 0) as size_bytes,
                COALESCE(v.file_count, 0) as file_count,
                COALESCE(v.created_at, a.min_created_at) as created_at,
                COALESCE(v.created_by, 'unknown') as created_by,
                v.updated_at,
                v.updated_by,
                COALESCE(v.description, '') as description,
                v.last_used_at,
                COALESCE(v.extra_perms, '{}'::jsonb) as extra_perms
            FROM (
                SELECT path, MIN(created_at) as min_created_at
                FROM asset
                WHERE workspace_id = $1 AND kind = 'volume'
                GROUP BY path
            ) a
            FULL OUTER JOIN volume v ON v.workspace_id = $1 AND v.name = a.path
            WHERE v.workspace_id = $1 OR a.path IS NOT NULL
         ) combined
         ORDER BY name
